videos.title: UK | 22nd May, Friday - Ep.10 - How AI Will Redefine Trading & Financial Systems
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 22nd May, Friday - Ep.10 - How AI Will Redefine Trading & Financial Systems Welcome to Episode 10 of RIFT Before You Quit — one of the most important and forward-thinking sessions in the entire series.

In this episode, we go far beyond trading charts and market psychology. We explore the future of financial infrastructure itself — how AI, automation, decentralized systems, and intelligent execution environments are reshaping the entire financial world.

This is not hype.
This is not science fiction.
This is the direction global finance is already moving toward.

As financial systems evolve, the winners of the next decade will not simply be the fastest traders or the loudest influencers — they will be the people and systems with the strongest infrastructure, smartest execution, and most scalable technology.

Inside this session, we break down:

✅ Why traditional finance is shifting from platforms to infrastructure
✅ How AI is becoming foundational to financial markets
✅ Why manual trading is slowly becoming obsolete
✅ The rise of autonomous capital systems
✅ How institutions are already using AI-driven execution environments
✅ Why on-chain finance and self-custody are transforming global markets
✅ The evolution from emotional trading to intelligent systems
✅ How algorithmic infrastructure is dominating modern finance
✅ Why decentralized financial participation is growing rapidly
✅ The future of AI-powered trading and market participation
✅ Why RIFT was built around this future from day one

We also dive into some of the biggest paradigm shifts happening right now:

AI in finance
On-chain execution systems
Self-custodial trading environments
Automated market infrastructure
Institutional adoption of machine learning
Financial sovereignty through decentralized systems

This episode also introduces exciting insight into the future roadmap of RIFT, including:

🔥 Copy Trading
🔥 High Frequency Trading integrations
🔥 Expanded Auto Trading functionality
🔥 AI-enhanced execution systems
🔥 Reward-based ecosystem growth
🔥 Community-driven strategy expansion

One of the biggest takeaways from this session is simple:

The future of finance will not belong to the fastest reaction.
It will belong to the strongest structure.

RIFT is not being built as just another trading app.
It is being built as an intelligent financial infrastructure designed for the next generation of market participation.

Whether you are a trader, builder, educator, community leader, or someone trying to understand where finance is heading next — this episode will completely change the way you view markets, AI, automation, and the future of wealth creation.

⚡ Topics Covered in Episode 10:

AI Financial Infrastructure
Autonomous Capital Systems
Algorithmic Trading Expansion
Decentralized Finance Evolution
Machine-Assisted Allocation
Structured Capital Participation
Smart Financial Infrastructure
Human vs AI Execution
Future of Self-Custody
Intelligent Market Systems
Institutional AI Adoption
On-Chain Financial Architecture

📌 Next Episode Preview:
Episode 11 – The War of Attention
How social media influencers, market narratives, FOMO, and emotional manipulation affect retail traders — and how institutions exploit emotional crowds.

Thank you for being part of the RIFT journey.

videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Drop Both Games At Home and Head to Vegas With Their Season in the Balance Colorado Avalanche drop both home games as Vegas Golden Knights seize momentum—can Nathan MacKinnon and crew rally with their season on the line?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson dissect the Avalanche's frustrating loss, questioning the team's execution and highlighting blocked shots, power play struggles, and the absence of Cale Makar. Insights focus on Scott Wedgewood's key saves, Ross Colton's lone bright moment, and the need for Brock Nelson, Valeri Nichushkin, and Martin Necas to step up. Discussion covers high-danger scoring chances, Vegas’s defensive anticipation, and the inconsistent officiating that haunted both teams.

Will a potential Cale Makar return ignite Colorado in Vegas? Explore how momentum, missed opportunities, and crucial lineup changes could decide the Avalanche’s playoff fate.

Everydayer Club:
If you never miss an episode, it’s time to make it official. Join the Locked On Avalanche Everydayer Club and get ad-free audio, access to our members-only Discord, and more — all built for our most loyal fans.

videos.title: Hindi | 22nd May, Friday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 22nd May, Friday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | THE CJ CUP | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 2 | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Check out the best shots of the day from Round 2 of the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson, featuring Si Woo Kim, Sungjae Im, Jordan Spieth, and Scottie Scheffler, among others.

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.summary_source_text:
Ultimate Galaxy S Speed Test! (Lab Tested) Sponsored by Zapier! Zapier MCP levels you up, connecting you directly to apps to automate your workflow. Start building with Zapier MCP and use my template to build today: https://bit.ly/4umqpKj  #ZapierPartner

Speed test between the last six generations of the Galaxy S Ultra phones using robots and a controlled environment to test them across different apps and features.

TEST NOTES:

- The devices were either purchased new or renewed by Samsung with original OEM parts and new batteries.
- The S21 Ultra was the only one purchased used; however, it had a recent battery replacement and is still at 100% health.
- Samsung's Renewed website only offered the S23 Ultra in an 8GB configuration, so it created a spec difference. However, it didn't end up playing a major role in this test.
- Screens were calibrated to 200 nits with auto brightness turned off.
- Devices are within an equal distance of a WiFi point.
- Tested in a temperature-controlled environment.
- Footage sped up at different parts for a better viewing experience.
- The S21 Ultra is not eligible for the One UI 8 / Android 16 update, so it was tested on One UI 7 / Android 15 — the latest software it supports.

Software versions at the time of testing:

- Galaxy S21 Ultra: One UI 7, Android 15
- Galaxy S22 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S23 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S24 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S25 Ultra: One UI 8, Android 16
- Galaxy S26 Ultra: One UI 8.5, Android 16

videos.title: AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness
videos.summary_source_text:
AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness Princeton researchers just revealed Continual Harness, a self-improving AI system that learns while it is already running. It can change its own instructions, build helper agents, create reusable tools, store memories, fix mistakes, and keep improving without a reset button. What started as an AI playing Pokémon may point to something much bigger: AI agents that can adapt without humans constantly stepping in.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Princeton paper on Continual Harness and self-improving AI agents
SOURCE: https://arxiv.org/html/2605.09998v1
Continual Harness project page explaining reset-free self-improvement
SOURCE: https://sethkarten.ai/continual-harness/
Hugging Face paper summary on Pokémon Red and Emerald results
SOURCE: https://huggingface.co/papers/2605.09998
Official GitHub repository for Continual Harness
SOURCE: https://github.com/sethkarten/continual-harness
Gemini Plays Pokémon case study and agent harness background
SOURCE: https://www.dbreunig.com/2025/06/17/an-agentic-case-study-playing-pok%C3%A9mon-with-gemini.html

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than an AI playing a game. Continual Harness shows an AI agent improving itself during a live task, building its own tools, refining its own strategy, and carrying knowledge forward instead of starting over. The same idea could matter for robots, computer agents, autonomous assistants, and any AI system that needs to learn from the real world while it is already operating.

videos.title: How To Deke Under The Defender’s Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Deke Under The Defender’s Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: How To Get Defenders To Expose Themselves
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Get Defenders To Expose Themselves Troy Terry has mastered two key strategies for attacking triangles and exposing defenders and I uncovered them by accident when Pavel Barber and I put GoPros on our heads during 3-on-3s.

What I realized re-watching that footage: there's way more time on the puck than I thought, if you pay attention to where defenders' sticks are positioned. And if you bait your opponent correctly, you can actually use their stick momentum against them. That's when I started dissecting players like Crosby, I found Troy Terry has perfected this dangle by design movement.

videos.title: The Buttcrack Drill to Get Rid Of Your Sway  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Buttcrack Drill to Get Rid Of Your Sway  #golfswing #golftips Place an alignment stick in between your butt cheeks - yes, you read that right. Right between your butt cheeks! This silly drill is a super simple way to ensure that you’re turning properly in your backswing instead of swaying or shifting. If you lose the alignment stick and move away from it, you’re moving wrong! 
If this is something you struggle with, you don’t need more tips, you need the right plan. We’ve created coaching plans designed to fix specific problems faster.

videos.title: Why You Feel Exhausted After Lunch | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Feel Exhausted After Lunch | Dr. Mandell Most people eat lunch and feel worse afterward, sleepy, bloated, mentally foggy, craving sugar, and reaching for caffeine just to get through the rest of the day. But what if your lunch could do the exact opposite? In this video, I show you the real lunch I just finished eating and explain how every bite of food sends powerful signals to your body that influence inflammation, blood sugar, energy, cravings, brain function, gut health, metabolism, circulation, and even aging. Learn why healthy fats, omega 3s, fiber, antioxidants, phytonutrients, and whole foods affect your hormones and energy differently than ultra processed foods, refined starches, fried foods, and sugary meals. This is not about dieting or perfection, it’s about understanding how food affects your body on a deeper physiological level so you can start making choices that support long term health, stable energy, better focus, and reduced inflammation naturally.

Hole-in-one to tie the LEAD from Sungjae Im! | THE CJ CUP | 2026 Sungjae Im makes an ace from 224 yards out on the par-3 7th hole in for a share of the lead in Round 2 at THE CJ CUP 2026! Presented by @trugreen. 

The PGA TOUR returns to Texas for the 2026 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson at TPC Craig Ranch, with hometown hero and defending champion Scottie Scheffler leading the field after his historic eight-shot victory last year. Dallas natives Jordan Spieth and Si Woo Kim also return to a redesigned TPC Craig Ranch, while major champion Brooks Koepka headlines another strong Texas field alongside rising local star Pierceson Coody. This year marks the debut of a renovated course overseen by World Golf Hall of Famer Lanny Wadkins, with longer holes, rebuilt greens and repositioned bunkers set to provide a tougher test. The tournament also continues its Mental Health Awareness Month initiatives, highlighted by the annual “Green Out” celebration and charitable efforts surrounding the iconic par-3 17th hole, “The Ranch.” With FedExCup points, Signature Event positioning and momentum heading into the PGA Championship all on the line, another exciting week awaits in Texas.

videos.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash Is Getting ROASTED (And Nobody's Talking About the Best Thing They Shipped)
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.5 Flash Is Getting ROASTED (And Nobody's Talking About the Best Thing They Shipped) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Google I/O 2026 just dropped a wave of AI announcements — Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini Omni, Antigravity 2.0, Spark, Universal Cart, AI eyewear, and more. But the model Google hyped hardest is the LEAST loved by developers, and the announcement nobody's talking about might be the best thing they shipped all year.

In this breakdown, I cut through the keynote spin and walk you through every major announcement — what's working today, what's still vaporware, and what to actually try this week. Real developer reactions, real benchmarks, real verdicts.

🔥 TIMESTAMPS
00:00 The model Google hyped is getting ROASTED
01:03 What I/O 2026 was really about: agents everywhere
01:40 Gemini 3.5 Flash — specs, benchmarks, and the cost problem
04:37 Gemini Omni — the announcement nobody's talking about
06:31 Google Antigravity 2.0 — agent orchestration done right
08:42 Gemini Spark — the most ambitious (and risky) bet
10:43 Gemini app facelift, Daily Brief, and Workspace updates
12:31 Universal Cart, AI eyewear, and AI Mode in Search
13:52 What the experts (and Sam Altman) are saying
15:04 Final verdict: what to use, what to skip

📌 KEY TAKEAWAYS
- Gemini 3.5 Flash: ~5.5x more expensive than the previous Flash for marginal — sometimes negative — quality gains. 60% negative community reaction.
- Gemini Omni: The surprise winner. Conversational video editing that actually works. SynthID watermarked.
- Antigravity 2.0: Solid upgrade. Voice commands, multi-agent orchestration, /grill-me command. $100/mo AI Ultra plan raises eyebrows.
- Gemini Spark: Always-on personal agent with full Gmail/Docs/Drive/Calendar access. Powerful — and a massive trust ask.
- Daily Brief, Universal Cart, AI Mode in Search: Mixed bag. Some ship-ready, some still rolling out.

💬 I want to hear from you:
→ Team Flash, or already reverting to an older model?
→ Would you actually let an AI read all your emails?
→ Which IDE are you using right now — Cursor, Antigravity, Claude Code, something else?

Drop your honest take in the comments.

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for hands-on tests of every tool in this video — real workflows, real bugs, real verdicts.

videos.title: Master These 6 AI Skills Before It's Too Late
videos.summary_source_text:
Master These 6 AI Skills Before It's Too Late *Top 100 AI Tools for Business:* https://clickhubspot.com/hswc

I go step by step to show how I use AI skills in 2026 to save time, build faster, and get better results.

I cover the top AI skills I think matter most right now. I start with prompt engineering, so you can talk to AI the right way and get clearer answers from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

Then I show how I use AI for deep research with tools like NotebookLM. This helps me turn lots of notes, websites, videos, and files into useful research without wasting hours.

I also walk through AI content creation. I show how AI can help make images, videos, voiceovers, ads, and other content with simple prompts. I use tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Veo, and Google Flow to show how this works.

I also explain AI agents and how they can do full jobs for you, not just answer questions. Then I show vibe coding with tools like Lovable and Claude Code, where you can build websites, apps, and AI tools without writing code.

Last, I talk about AI orchestration. This is how I connect different AI tools into one simple workflow, so the work gets done faster from start to finish.

This video is for anyone who wants to use AI tools for business, content, research, coding, marketing, and daily work in 2026. *Top 100 AI Tools for Business:* https://clickhubspot.com/hswc

videos.title: Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 2 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open All the best bits from round two of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium.

Round two also marked an emotional farewell to Nicolas Colsaerts as he played the final tournament of his professional career. The Belgian signed off in style with an eagle and three consecutive birdies on the front nine. There were plenty of low scores throughout the day, with Tom Vaillant, Andrew ‘Beef’ Johnston, David Ravetto and Davis Bryant all carding brilliant rounds of 7-under.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Så vet du när du har vunnit det ekonomiska spelet (4 %-regeln förklarad) #shorts
videos.summary_source_text:
Så vet du när du har vunnit det ekonomiska spelet (4 %-regeln förklarad) #shorts Sofia ställde frågan: när har man egentligen vunnit det ekonomiska spelet?Jag tänker att det finns två sätt att veta.


Det första är känslan av "tillräckligt" — att mer pengar inte väsentligt skulle förändra din vardag. På ekonomispråk: marginalnyttan av mer pengar går mot noll.

Det andra är matematiken. Logga in på minpension.se och kolla vad du får ut livsvarigt från 65 års ålder. Räkna ut gapet mot dina månadsutgifter, multiplicera med 12 och sedan med 30. Det är beloppet du behöver ha på ett ISK för att med ~90 % sannolikhet kunna täcka gapet i 30 år.

Exempel: går du back 5 000 kr/mån = 60 000 kr/år × 30 = 1,8 miljoner.

Bygger på William Bengens klassiska 4-procentsregel, justerad för svensk ISK-skatt (därför × 30 i stället för × 25).

📩 Vill du ha fler ekonomitips i organiserad form? Anmäl dig till vårt nyhetsbrev där 70 000+ läsare redan finns: https://rikatillsammans.se/nyhetsbrev

Det första är känslan av "tillräckligt" — att mer pengar inte väsentligt skulle förändra din vardag. På ekonomispråk: marginalnyttan av mer pengar går mot noll.

Det andra är matematiken. Logga in på minpension.se och kolla vad du får ut livsvarigt från 65 års ålder. Räkna ut gapet mot dina månadsutgifter, multiplicera med 12 och sedan med 30. Det är beloppet du behöver ha på ett ISK för att med ~90 % sannolikhet kunna täcka gapet i 30 år.

Exempel: går du back 5 000 kr/mån = 60 000 kr/år × 30 = 1,8 miljoner.

Bygger på William Bengens klassiska 4-procentsregel, justerad för svensk ISK-skatt (därför × 30 i stället för × 25).

📩 Vill du ha fler ekonomitips i organiserad form? Anmäl dig till vårt nyhetsbrev där 70 000+ läsare redan finns: https://rikatillsammans.se/nyhetsbrev

videos.title: What Processed Food Can Never Replicate
videos.summary_source_text:
What Processed Food Can Never Replicate Real food is far more complex than most people realize. A carrot grows surrounded by millions of bacteria in the soil, yet it naturally contains compounds that protect and preserve it. That is the difference between real food and manufactured food products. Nature built these foods with layers of nutrients and protective chemicals that science still does not fully understand.

videos.title: Anthropic Is Getting More Expensive
videos.summary_source_text:
Anthropic Is Getting More Expensive 🗓️ Save these dates:

Anthropic is making massive changes to Claude’s pricing. Here is exactly what is happening and when: 

- Weekly limits for Claude Code are increasing by 50% through July 13th. That means you can send significantly more prompts and generate more code before hitting the usage cap.

- BUT starting June 15th, using Claude outside of Claude Code (like OpenClaw or Hermes) means you get a set monthly credit, and once credits run out, you are billed at the expensive API rate. Some people are estimating a 100-200 credit will burn out in just a few HOURS of heavy work, making Claude Code way more expensive for many.

Send this to anyone using Claude Code so they aren't surprised by their next bill…

videos.title: Mastering the 60 Yard Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
Mastering the 60 Yard Shot 📍Keep the arms straight, that way the body works more aggressively to keep you going through the shot, and you're less armsy.

 📍Feel like you really take a shorter back swing and a more aggressive follow through to the finish. That's gonna keep you accelerating through the golf ball.

📍 Finally, if we can de-lo- loft this club, we're gonna hit some great low spinning or high spinning shots that launch really low, just like the pros. 📍Keep the arms straight, that way the body works more aggressively to keep you going through the shot, and you're less armsy.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. videos.title: Från Tanzania till Göteborgsvarvet
videos.summary_source_text:
Från Tanzania till Göteborgsvarvet Från Tanzania till Göteborgsvarvet

I bergen vid Hanang i Tanzania tränar några av världens mest lovande långdistanslöpare. Under ledning av den tidigare världsmästaren Gidamis Shahanga lever och tränar de på hög höjd med en gemensam dröm — att lyckas som professionella löpare.

I denna dokumentär följer vi deras resa från de dammiga vägarna i Katesh till Göteborgsvarvet, ett av världens största halvmaratonlopp. För löparna handlar det inte bara om sport, utan om möjligheten att förändra sina liv.

Filmen skildrar vardagen, träningen, uppoffringarna och drömmarna bakom elitidrotten — och mötet mellan Tanzania och Sverige genom löpningen.

En berättelse om uthållighet, hopp och jakten på en framtid.

videos.title: Kommer pensionssystemet krascha? Nej — och här är varför
videos.summary_source_text:
Kommer pensionssystemet krascha? Nej — och här är varför För många år sedan var jag själv en alarmist som pratade om 40-40-40-blåsningen: 40 timmar i veckan i 40 år för att leva på 40 procent av lönen. Men det stämmer inte.

Oberoende internationella jämförelser placerar Sverige konsekvent bland de tio bästa pensionssystemen i världen. Vi kombinerar fonderade pengar — tjänstepension och premiepension — med inkomstpensionen, som i praktiken är en garanti från staten. Oron för att vi blir färre som arbetar har vi kompenserat för med riktåldern. Det finns gas och broms i systemet.

Är du en snittsvensk med ett vanligt arbetsliv bakom dig behöver du inte oroa dig, särskilt eftersom utgifterna ofta minskar i pensionen. Det som faktiskt spelar roll: öka din inkomst, se till att du har tjänstepension och gör bra val i den.

Mer om pension och våra sju tips finns på rikatillsammans.se och i podden RikaTillsammans.

Oberoende internationella jämförelser placerar Sverige konsekvent bland de tio bästa pensionssystemen i världen. videos.title: Your Eyes Reveal Kidney Damage Years Before Symptoms
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Eyes Reveal Kidney Damage Years Before Symptoms Your eyes can give powerful clues about your kidney health. It’s critical to catch kidney disease before it hits stage 4, and eye changes are among the first kidney warning signs. Learn to spot the signs early.  

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4v3rpmH

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Introduction: Eye kidney health connection
0:35 Puffy eyes and kidney disease
1:34 The best lab tests to detect kidney damage
4:08 Kidney disease symptoms related to the eyes
7:21 The best diet for kidney health

Keep watching to learn the early warning signs of kidney problems and how to support kidney health naturally:
▶️ https://youtu.be/knY-Foaeqlg
▶️ https://youtu.be/d-0vFQSqUXM
▶️ https://youtu.be/loSpk_02OXc

Puffy eyes can be one of the earliest signs of kidney disease. Your kidneys help filter protein, and when they become damaged, excess protein can leak into the urine. As protein levels drop in the blood, fluid can build up in the tissues, often showing up first as puffy eyes.

You can lose up to 90% of kidney function without noticeable symptoms, which is why early detection is so important.

If you notice early kidney disease symptoms, the following tests can help assess kidney function and damage:
 • eGFR test
 • Urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio
 • Blood pressure testing

It’s best to catch kidney disease before stage 4, and the eyes can provide important clues about kidney health. Foamy urine, pitting edema, and anemia are also common signs of kidney problems.

Following a low-carb diet is one of the best ways to support kidney health.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: Carolina Hurricanes Drop Game 1 in 6-2 Rout of the Canadiens to Start Conference Final
videos.summary_source_text:
Carolina Hurricanes Drop Game 1 in 6-2 Rout of the Canadiens to Start Conference Final Game 1 did not go the way the Carolina Hurricanes expected, as they lost 6-2 in a rout at the hands of the Montreal Canadiens. Of the five goals given up by Frederik Andersen, none can be attributed to him. That said, what went wrong for the Hurricanes? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how Game 1 went for the Hurricanes. When it comes down to it, the Hurricanes did not look like they were ready to go, just gifting the Canadiens free chances to the net in the first period. Sloppy defense led to four goals and a deficit they could not recover from. Also, they left Andersen out to dry for much of the game. Despite getting an early lead, it did not mean much in the end. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how this does give way to the "rest vs. rust" debate after a game in which the Hurricanes gave up more than 2 goals. The six goals in Game 1 matched a three-game total in other series. What do the Hurricanes need to do to bounce back from that? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing what the Hurricanes need to do to even the series back up on Saturday for Game 2. They cannot go down 2-0 in the series with it heading back to Montreal after the weekend. If they want to beat the Eastern Conference "curse", they will need a huge bounce-back win. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Investera 100 000 kr — allt på en gång eller månadsspara?
videos.summary_source_text:
Investera 100 000 kr — allt på en gång eller månadsspara? Matematiskt korrekt: investera allt direkt — tid i marknaden är en av de starkaste faktorerna för avkastning. Emotionellt korrekt: sprida ut, eftersom de flesta inte klarar ett 30-procentigt fall som i mars 2020 utan att sälja i botten.

Vår rekommendation: gör både och. Sätt in en del direkt — så stor del som känns bekväm — och månadsspara resten. Då tar du del av tiden i marknaden utan att riskera att panik-säljas ut vid första nedgång.
Mer på rikatillsammans.se — Sveriges största community för privatekonomi sedan 2007.

videos.title: 21.5: Slafkovsky stays scorching hot with 3-point game! 🇸🇰⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
21.5: Slafkovsky stays scorching hot with 3-point game! 🇸🇰⭐ Juraj Slafkovsky and the Canadiens simply cannot be contained! The Slovak star contributes 3 points in Montreal's 6-2 win over Carolina in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final, tallying 2 goals and an assist. The goals are Slafkovsky's 5th and 6th of these Stanley Cup Playoffs, making him the first Slovak player with at least 5 goals in a single postseason since Marian Gaborik, who had 14 goals in 2014. Slafkovsky's outstanding offensive performance earns him both 1st star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 21st May, Thursday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion
videos.summary_source_text:
Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter är här – och ställer nya krav på alla företag som tillämpar IFRS.

Den nya standarden för presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027.

IFRS 18 innebär bland annat en ny struktur i resultaträkningen, förtydligade principer kring aggregering och disaggregering samt nya upplysningskrav – inte minst kring så kallade Management-defined Performance Measures (MPMs). Även om fokus ofta hamnar på presentation, sträcker sig effekterna betydligt längre – till processer, system, nyckeltal och dialogen med marknaden.

Men var börjar man – och vad bör man ha koll på redan nu?

I samband med lanseringen av vår nya LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18 bjuder vi in Cecilia Nordenadler och Lisa Sagström – båda redovisningsspecialister på PwC med inriktning på IFRS till det första avsnittet. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, rådgivare inom finansiell rapportering, går vi igenom vad standarden innebär, vilka de stora nyheterna är och vad bolag bör göra för att komma igång.

I serien djupdyker vi löpande i specifika områden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. Oavsett om du just börjat bekanta dig med IFRS 18 eller är mitt i implementeringen kommer du att få med dig värdefulla insikter och praktiska takeaways som underlättar ditt arbete.

Läs mer på: https://www.pwc.se/ IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter är här – och ställer nya krav på alla företag som tillämpar IFRS.

Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027.

Även om fokus ofta hamnar på presentation, sträcker sig effekterna betydligt längre – till processer, system, nyckeltal och dialogen med marknaden.

I samband med lanseringen av vår nya LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18 bjuder vi in Cecilia Nordenadler och Lisa Sagström – båda redovisningsspecialister på PwC med inriktning på IFRS till det första avsnittet. I serien djupdyker vi löpande i specifika områden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. videos.title: The Hockey World Went Into Overreaction Overload After the Avs Game 1 Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
The Hockey World Went Into Overreaction Overload After the Avs Game 1 Loss Colorado Avalanche’s struggles spark overreactions after Game 1 loss to Vegas Golden Knights. Are Nathan MacKinnon and company really in trouble, or is it just playoff noise? Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate whether execution, not Vegas’ dominance, determined the outcome, and dissect what went wrong for the league’s top-scoring team—including Scott Wedgewood’s performance in net and key absences like Cale Makar.

The episode spotlights how analytics and heat maps may tell a misleading story about the Avalanche’s efforts, and questions whether Vegas’ win was a product of structure or simply capitalizing on Colorado’s mistakes. Listeners get insider takes on playoff overreactions, media narratives, and why Carter Hart’s goaltending gives Vegas confidence. Plus, thoughts from the Subtext Crew, potential returns from injury, and what changes the Avalanche must make heading into Game 2. Can Colorado bounce back and reclaim control of the series?

videos.title: You Might Be Destroying Healthy Food
videos.summary_source_text:
You Might Be Destroying Healthy Food Fasting is not just about eating less, it is also about how the food is prepared. High heat cooking methods like frying, grilling, and charring can create inflammatory compounds that place extra stress on the body. Gentler cooking methods, like steaming, slow cooking, and moist heat, help preserve the food while reducing that inflammatory load. Sometimes the difference is not only what is eaten, but whether the food was nourished or destroyed before it ever reached the plate.

This is a clip form my video "How to Fast for Different Goals"

videos.title: Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE
videos.summary_source_text:
Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE Boston Dynamics just revealed a major Atlas upgrade. The new Atlas can lift a loaded mini-fridge, handle shifting weight, and move its body in ways humans physically cannot. At the same time, Unitree’s G1 is responding to live voice commands, while Gatsby is testing humanoid robots as on-demand home cleaners. Humanoid robots are no longer just doing impressive demos. They are starting to move into real work.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉️ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@space.revolution

📌 What You’ll See:
Boston Dynamics explains how Atlas learned to lift a fridge
SOURCE: https://bostondynamics.com/blog/training-a-humanoid-robot-for-hard-work/

TechRadar report on Atlas lifting a mini-fridge and carrying drinks
SOURCE: https://www.techradar.com/ai-platforms-assistants/we-have-not-seen-the-limits-of-what-atlas-can-do-boston-dynamics-shows-off-atlas-robots-impressive-fridge-lifting-and-drink-delivery-capabilities-its-only-limited-by-our-imagination

Unitree G1 responds to live voice commands in real time
SOURCE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B-a8TB8ttII

Gatsby completes its first humanoid robot home cleaning job
SOURCE: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260518070991/en/Gatsby-Makes-History-with-First-Humanoid-Robot-Cleaning-for-a-U.S.-Consumer

Hyundai plans to deploy 25,000 Atlas robots across factories
SOURCE: https://www.koreatimes.co.kr/business/companies/20260519/hyundai-motor-group-unveils-plan-to-deploy-25000-atlas-humanoid-robots

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than another robot demo. Atlas is now being trained for physical work with heavy, awkward objects, shifting weight, and real-world uncertainty. Unitree is pushing humanoids toward voice-controlled actions, while Gatsby is testing a service model where people book robots for home cleaning. Factories, warehouses, and homes may be the first real battlegrounds for humanoid robots.

videos.title: How To Flip The Puck Over Your Opponent's Stick
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Flip The Puck Over Your Opponent's Stick The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Claude 5: Mythos, 5M Token Context & 82% SWE Bench Explained
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude 5: Mythos, 5M Token Context & 82% SWE Bench Explained Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

videos.title: If I Could Teach Golfers ONE Thing… It Would Be This
videos.summary_source_text:
If I Could Teach Golfers ONE Thing… It Would Be This https://hackmotion.com/affiliates/alex/?aff=198&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=alexelliott&utm_content=pp&utm_term=21_05_2026

Most golfers try to compress their irons by hitting down harder… but that’s not what creates a pure strike.

Join my whatsapp channel to recieve tips, drills, PDF guides and so much more https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8Q6rHG3R3bSfYTJx2q

Most golfers try to compress their irons by hitting down harder… but that’s not what creates a pure strike.

In this video, I’ll show you the real key to compressing your irons consistently the same move I teach golfers of all levels to improve strike, contact, and ball flight fast. 

You’ll learn:

How to properly compress your irons
What actually creates that clean, powerful strike
The biggest mistake stopping golfers from compressing the ball
A simple drill to improve your iron strike instantly
How to create better contact with every club in the bag

If you struggle with thin shots, heavy strikes, weak contact, or inconsistent iron play, this lesson will completely change how you think about impact.

Master this move, and you’ll start striking your irons cleaner, lower, and more powerfully than ever before.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Hi I’m Matt Fryer, welcome to my channel MattFryerGolf. This YouTube channel is to help you play better golf and love the game even more!

I specialise in golf lessons, golf club news and other entertaining golf content.

I you want to play better golf I cover all topics in my golf lessons such as, how to fix your slice, fix your hook, help you drive the golf ball longer, hit your irons consistently , master your shortgame and hole more putts.

videos.title: Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open
videos.summary_source_text:
Round 1 Highlights | 2026 Soudal Open Tune in to all the best moments from Round One of the 2026 Soudal Open at Rinkven International Golf Club in Belgium. The day featured eagle hole-outs, a hole-in-one and plenty of birdies. Leading the way at 8-under is Zander Lombard, with Jacob Skov Olesen and Richard Sterne just one shot back, while 10 players sit tied at 5-under.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

After a break for the US PGA Championship last week, the European Swing resumes with the second of six events across the continent and the first of five consecutive national opens on the DP World Tour schedule as the Tour returns to Belgium for the Soudal Open. While this event can trace its roots back well over 100 years, this week sees the 20th time it has been part of the DP World Tour schedule. First played in 1910 and won by 1907 Open champion Arnaud Massy, it would be played every year until 1958 barring breaks for the two World Wars. Local star Thomas Detry is likely to be the headline act this week as he, almost unbelievably, searches for his first DP World Tour win after five runner-up finishes.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

▪ 98 % av globalfonder i euro underpresterade på 10 år

videos.title: How To ACTUALLY Do Lunges (Feat. The “Rock”)
videos.summary_source_text:
How To ACTUALLY Do Lunges (Feat. The “Rock”) If you stopped doing lunges because the balance requirement keeps you from using enough weight to actually build your legs, you’re going to love this fix. Whether you’re doing dumbbell lunges or barbell lunges, the way you step makes all the difference.

The biggest mistake people make on lunges is keeping their feet too narrow. They think every step has to move straight forward or straight back on a tightrope. The problem is, the second you add any meaningful weight, that narrow base of support makes balance almost impossible.

Watch Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson perform walking dumbbell lunges in this clip and pay attention to where his feet land. He doesn’t just step straight ahead. He steps up and slightly out with every rep. By the time he reaches the bottom of the lunge, his feet are several inches wider apart, giving him a much stronger base to push from.

That one adjustment can completely change the exercise.

The dumbbell lunge and barbell lunge are two of the best leg exercises you can do, but too many people abandon them for machines because they feel unstable. That’s a mistake. Lunges give you unilateral leg strength, athletic carryover, glute and quad development, and a benefit you simply don’t get from relying only on squat patterns.

Once you fix your balance, I’d suggest starting with reverse lunges whenever possible, especially if you deal with knee tendonitis or anterior knee pain. Reverse lunges tend to be more knee-friendly than forward lunges because they usually create less forward stress at the knee.

If you do perform forward lunges, don’t slide or reach the foot low into the ground. Step up, then place the foot down from above. As you’ll see in the full video linked to this Short, The Rock does exactly that. This helps reduce shearing stress on the knee while keeping the movement strong and controlled.

Fix the step, widen the base, and suddenly lunges stop feeling like a balance test and start feeling like the powerful leg builder they were always supposed to be.

For more tips on how to build muscle and get bigger legs, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Jeff Cavaliere MSPT, CSCS served as both the head physical therapist and assistant strength coach for the New York Mets. Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). If you stopped doing lunges because the balance requirement keeps you from using enough weight to actually build your legs, you’re going to love this fix. Whether you’re doing dumbbell lunges or barbell lunges, the way you step makes all the difference.

The biggest mistake people make on lunges is keeping their feet too narrow. They think every step has to move straight forward or straight back on a tightrope. The problem is, the second you add any meaningful weight, that narrow base of support makes balance almost impossible.

Watch Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson perform walking dumbbell lunges in this clip and pay attention to where his feet land. He doesn’t just step straight ahead. He steps up and slightly out with every rep. By the time he reaches the bottom of the lunge, his feet are several inches wider apart, giving him a much stronger base to push from.

That one adjustment can completely change the exercise.

The dumbbell lunge and barbell lunge are two of the best leg exercises you can do, but too many people abandon them for machines because they feel unstable. That’s a mistake. Lunges give you unilateral leg strength, athletic carryover, glute and quad development, and a benefit you simply don’t get from relying only on squat patterns.

Once you fix your balance, I’d suggest starting with reverse lunges whenever possible, especially if you deal with knee tendonitis or anterior knee pain. Reverse lunges tend to be more knee-friendly than forward lunges because they usually create less forward stress at the knee.

If you do perform forward lunges, don’t slide or reach the foot low into the ground. Step up, then place the foot down from above. As you’ll see in the full video linked to this Short, The Rock does exactly that. This helps reduce shearing stress on the knee while keeping the movement strong and controlled.

Fix the step, widen the base, and suddenly lunges stop feeling like a balance test and start feeling like the powerful leg builder they were always supposed to be.

For more tips on how to build muscle and get bigger legs, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so that you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Get Your Workout & Meal Plan:
📝 https://www.athleanx.com

Connect With Me:
👉 https://www.instagram.com/athleanx 

For complete step-by-step workout programs, head on over to athleanx.com and make sure to use the program selector to find the training plan that is best suited to your personal goals.

Jeff Cavaliere MSPT, CSCS served as both the head physical therapist and assistant strength coach for the New York Mets. Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA).

Is it a Budget Masterpiece or an Outdoor Flop? LM1 Real Review The Shot Scope LM1 accuracy test will shock you… Is it a budget masterpiece or an outdoor flop? 

In this video, we put the ultra-affordable, pocket-sized Shot Scope LM1 launch monitor through its paces to find out the absolute truth. No subscription fees, a built-in display, and an amazing price point make it look like a game-changer—but there is a massive catch you need to know before you buy it. 

We threw the LM1 up against the industry gold standard, the GC Quad, in a head-to-head battle both indoors and out on the golf course. The data split was unbelievable. Indoors, this tiny Doppler radar is an absolute genius, matching the premium data within a couple of yards. But once you take it outside into the wind? The accuracy claims face a serious reality check.

videos.title: Har DU känt Mellanförskap: Känslan när man inte hör hemma eller passar in!
videos.summary_source_text:
Har DU känt Mellanförskap: Känslan när man inte hör hemma eller passar in! Har du någonsin känt att du inte riktigt passar in någonstans? 🥺 Så har jag känt nästan hela mitt liv och det finns faktiskt ett ord för det där. Mellanförskap
I den här nya serien ”Filip Tänker Högt” tar jag upp tankar och funderingar i mitt huvud. 

Mellanförskap handlar egentligen om känslan av att stå mellan två världar utan att riktigt känna att man passar in fullt ut i någon av dem och jag tror länge att jag såg det som en svaghet. Men idag ser jag det mer som att jag fått flera perspektiv istället.

Här är lite insikter och sammanfattning från videon:
-Det tog lång tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja en sida. Jag fick skapa min egen identitet istället.

Det som gjorde att jag kände mig annorlunda när jag var yngre är nog också det som gjort mig till den jag är idag.
Man behöver inte passa perfekt in i ett fack för att höra hemma.

Det är okej att vara lite mitt emellan. Det betyder inte att man är mindre hel.

Jag tror många spenderar mycket energi på att försöka passa in, när det egentligen är våra olikheter som gör oss intressanta.

Man blir väldigt bra på att förstå människor när man själv vet hur det känns att känna sig utanför.

Det tog tid innan jag förstod att jag inte behövde välja mellan två identiteter. Jag fick bygga min egen.

videos.title: The Vitamin D Secret
videos.summary_source_text:
The Vitamin D Secret How can you overcome vitamin D deficiency on the carnivore diet without increasing your intake? Discover how the carnivore diet can improve gut health, insulin resistance, and chronic inflammation to improve vitamin D absorption and help optimize its benefits naturally.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4uWwxZJ

0:00 Introduction: Vitamin D and the carnivore diet 
1:01 Magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2, and D3
1:55 Other barriers to vitamin D absorption
2:11 Carnivore diet benefits 
3:19 Vitamin K2 benefits 
3:57 Cholesterol and vitamin D 
5:01 Vitamin D receptor resistance 
6:14 Carnivore diet results 

Keep watching for more on the carnivore diet and other ways to support gut health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/jZ4jNALF9Ys
▶️ https://youtu.be/zXd86RvNzZA
▶️ https://youtu.be/RCjQAQuWiYc

Many people notice major improvements on the carnivore diet, including reduced symptoms of autoimmune disease, less joint pain, improved mood, and better overall health.

Although beef, chicken, pork, and other meats are relatively low in vitamin D, the carnivore diet can still help correct vitamin D deficiency. Simply taking more vitamin D doesn’t always solve the problem.

Vitamin D depends on several important cofactors, including magnesium, zinc, vitamin K2, retinol, and cholesterol, the raw material used to make vitamin D in the body.

Vitamin D enters your cells through the vitamin D receptor. Vitamin D receptor resistance is very common, often caused by obesity, insulin resistance, and poor gut health.

Meat is a potent source of highly bioavailable nutrients, especially the cofactors needed for vitamin D. Many plant foods contain antinutrients that can interfere with nutrient absorption.
Vitamin D is made from cholesterol, so inadequate cholesterol intake can also impact vitamin D production.

The carnivore diet helps to reduce gut inflammation, increase autophagy, improve bile flow, reduce SIBO, and eliminate candida overgrowth, all of which support better vitamin D absorption and overall health.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

He Went From Amateur to Pro Level Ball Striking In Under 20 Minutes Watch Eric Cogorno work with a high handicap golfer to improve his golf swing by focusing on strengthening the grip and closing the club face on the backswing. This golf lesson covers how open club face position causes early release and flipping and provides clear instruction on how to use wrist angles to add shaft lean and compression for more solid iron contact.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch

• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Are Lamborghinis ACTUALLY FAST? Urus v BMW M5 DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
Are Lamborghinis ACTUALLY FAST? Urus v BMW M5 DRAG RACE BMW M5 Touring vs Lamborghini Urus super estate vs SUV drag race, rolling race, and brake test with Mat Watson.

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/seanysgarage for joining us for this race!

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-14-05

It’s time for an epic hybrid estate vs performance SUV showdown!We’ve got Mat in his new BMW M5 Touring, and it’s going head-to-head against a Lamborghini Urus over the quarter-mile. Will this hefty V8 hybrid have what it takes to bring down the lighter Italian super-SUV? Let’s take a closer look at the performance stats…Starting with the BMW M5, it’s powered by a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 coupled with an electric motor. Combined, they produce 727hp and 1,000Nm of torque. All that power is sent to all four wheels via an 8-speed automatic gearbox. It costs £116,160, and it tips the scales at a heavy 2,475kg!

Then we have the Lamborghini. It’s powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8, and this puts down 650hp and 850Nm! It comes equipped with all-wheel drive, and it costs £172,500. What’s more, despite being an SUV, it’s a fair bit lighter than the BMW, weighing in at 2,200kg! 

So the BMW is up on power, but will the additional 300kg help the Urus snatch the win? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

videos.title: It's Eastern Conference Final Go Time for the Carolina Hurricanes ft. Mike Maniscalco
videos.summary_source_text:
It's Eastern Conference Final Go Time for the Carolina Hurricanes ft. Mike Maniscalco It's an Eastern Conference Final Gameday for the Carolina Hurricanes as they take on the Montreal Canadiens in Game 1 on Thursday night. After almost two weeks of waiting, it's go time. Zach is joined by Hurricanes play-by-play and CanesCast co-host Mike Maniscalco to preview Game 1 and the ECF as a whole. On the Thursday Eastern Conference Final Crossover Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach & Mike begin the show by getting Mike's thoughts going into Game 1 for the Hurricanes. What makes this time different compared to others? What will he be watching out for in Game 1? Secondly, Zach & Mike discuss the series' storylines as a whole from Mike's perspective. Who could be the standouts and surprises for the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach concludes the show by giving his Canes to Click on who will score in Game 1 for the Hurricanes. Plus, he will share his thoughts on why the optimism is high for the Hurricanes in the Eastern Conference Final, especially in Game 1. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 20th May, Wed - Ep.9 - The Institutional Playbook: How Smart Money Really Controls the Market
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 20th May, Wed - Ep.9 - The Institutional Playbook: How Smart Money Really Controls the Market Welcome to Episode 9 of RIFT Before You Quit — one of the most eye-opening and advanced sessions in the entire series so far.

In this episode, we dive deep into the Institutional Playbook and uncover how professional capital, hedge funds, and “smart money” truly operate behind the financial markets.

Most retail traders are taught to chase profits, predict price movements, and react emotionally. But institutions operate completely differently. They focus on:

✅ Capital preservation
✅ Risk distribution
✅ Structured execution
✅ Long-term survivability
✅ Portfolio architecture
✅ Smart liquidity positioning
✅ Consistent compounding

This episode explains why institutional systems survive for decades while most retail traders struggle with volatility, leverage, emotional decision-making, and poor risk management.

You’ll learn how hedge funds structure billion-dollar portfolios, how smart money quietly accumulates positions before major market moves, and how institutions use liquidity sweeps and portfolio balancing to stay ahead of the crowd.

We also explore:

🔹 The difference between retail mindset vs institutional mindset
🔹 How smart money flows through the market
🔹 Why survivability is more important than prediction
🔹 The real purpose of risk management
🔹 Liquidity hunting and stop-loss sweeps
🔹 Dynamic portfolio rotation during different market conditions
🔹 Why institutions prioritize structure over emotion
🔹 How AI, automation, and structured execution are changing modern finance

Most importantly, this episode connects these institutional principles directly to the architecture behind the RIFT Auto Trading Engine — showing how diversification, structured allocation, and disciplined execution are built into the system itself.

This is not hype.
This is a deep educational breakdown of how professional capital behaves in the real world.

If you want to understand how markets truly function behind the scenes — this episode is essential viewing.

🔥 Key Takeaway:
The market does not reward emotion in the long run. It rewards structure, discipline, survivability, and intelligent execution.

📌 Topics Covered In This Episode:

• Institutional Trading Psychology
• Hedge Fund Portfolio Structures
• Smart Money Behavior
• Liquidity Sweeps & Stop Hunts
• Capital Preservation Strategies
• Dynamic Portfolio Rotation
• Retail vs Institutional Decision Making
• AI & Structured Market Participation
• RIFT Auto Trading Engine Concepts
• Long-Term Compounding Principles

🚀 NEXT EPISODE PREVIEW – Episode 10
The Future of Financial Infrastructure

We’ll explore:
⚡ AI-driven finance
⚡ Autonomous capital systems
⚡ On-chain execution infrastructure
⚡ Machine-assisted allocation
⚡ Financial automation trends
⚡ The next evolution beyond traditional trading apps

📅 Join us LIVE every:
🟢 Monday

🟢 Friday

videos.title: Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Mistakes Lead to Golden Knights Goals in Game 1 Loss Colorado Avalanche undone by self-inflicted wounds in Western Conference Finals Game 1. Despite a flurry of high-danger chances and 38 shots on net, the Avs fall 4-2 to the Vegas Golden Knights as costly mistakes and missed opportunities haunt their playoff run. Can the Avalanche regroup and find the discipline needed to turn the series in their favor?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Carter Hart’s stellar goaltending, Ross Colton’s controversial penalty, and Nathan MacKinnon’s highlight-reel assist that gave the Avalanche life. Discussions spotlight Vegas’ defensive structure, the Avs’ erratic shot accuracy, and the critical absence of Cale Makar. With Brett Kulak’s under-the-radar performance and Valeri Nichushkin’s creative goal, the episode explores what Colorado must adjust ahead of Game 2. Will the Avalanche capitalize on their chances next time, or are the Golden Knights in control of the series momentum?

videos.title: Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 20th May, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

videos.title: The Problem With Constant Snacking
videos.summary_source_text:
The Problem With Constant Snacking Today’s food supply exposes the body to far more chemicals, additives, and processed ingredients than ever before. One of the simplest ways to lower that toxic load is not constantly eating throughout the day. Cutting out snacks and reducing how often food is consumed can significantly decrease the amount of toxins entering the body on a daily basis. Sometimes the healthiest change is not adding more, but finally giving the body a break.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd
